channel.title: silvopasture on Nature Works

item.title: Silvopasture
item.description:
Photo of silvopasture in northern Spain

A friend on my forest garden Telegram group posted a photo from northern Spain of silvopasture, where there’s animal farming and agroforestry combined. http://localhost:1313/blog/230502-silvopasture/
